hero.subtitle2: LEED Certified. 13 elevators. Israel's premier transit hub.

gallery.title: {gold}GATE{/gold} Jerusalem Renders
gallery.subtitle: A 40-story office landmark at the entrance to Jerusalem, beside the iconic String Bridge — world-class architecture in the heart of Israel's capital

why.title: Why {gold}GATE{/gold} Jerusalem?
why.locationDesc: At the entrance to Jerusalem, steps from the String Bridge and the Government Quarter. Walking distance to the Knesset, Supreme Court, Machane Yehuda Market and the Old City. The shortest distance between your business and Israel's centers of power.
why.transportDesc: Yitzhak Navon Station — 32 minutes to Tel Aviv. Green Line light rail opening 2026. 280 bus routes. Cycling paths. Jerusalem at your doorstep, Tel Aviv a commute away.
why.business: Not Just a Tower — A City Within a City
why.businessDesc: GATE is part of a 1.2 million sqm mixed-use district — international hotels, residences, a European-inspired commercial boulevard, cultural venues and 20 towers. A thriving business ecosystem, operating 24/7.

floors.title: Available Floors
floors.subtitle: Only 5 floors remaining — a rare investment opportunity in Jerusalem's new financial center
floors.tabuNote: Each floor can be subdivided into 8 independent Tabu-registered units

plans.title: Floor Plans & Office Layouts
plans.subtitle: Full modular flexibility — from a single executive suite to an entire floor. Floor 24: 1,550 sqm of limitless possibilities
plans.layoutDesc: A unique floor — all 13 elevators serve it, providing maximum exposure to all tower tenants.
plans.disclaimer: * Plans are for illustration only. Layout can be fully customized to client requirements.
plans.teaserDesc: From 2 spacious offices to a full open-plan floor

features.title: The Tower
features.subtitle: 40 floors of world-class design, certified green construction and premium specifications — set to redefine Jerusalem's business landscape
features.leedDesc: One of Jerusalem's first certified green buildings — significant energy savings, superior air quality and proven environmental responsibility
features.bankDesc: Personal bank guarantee for every buyer. Maximum security — your investment is fully protected throughout all construction phases
features.modularDesc: Full flexibility — from a single unit to a full floor

grants.title: Government Incentives — A Unique Business Advantage
grants.subtitle: The Jerusalem Development Authority offers substantial financial incentives to companies relocating offices to the city — a direct reduction in your investment cost
grants.grant1Desc: Grant for companies opening Jerusalem offices
grants.grant4Desc: Significantly reduced municipal tax rates — meaningful annual savings
grants.cta: Full ownership floor + government grant = your smartest next investment

location.title: Your Surroundings
location.subtitle: GATE sits at the heart of Jerusalem's action — centers of power, culture and transport, all within reach.
location.trainHook: Yitzhak Navon Station is adjacent to the complex. 32 minutes to Tel Aviv — a commute, not a journey.
location.lightRailHook: Green Line opening 2026. Direct access from the tower to all of Jerusalem.
location.knessetHook: The entire government quarter — your most important clients are right around the corner.
location.sacherParkHook: Jerusalem's green lung — morning run, outdoor meeting, or a proper lunch break.
location.machaneYehudaHook: Business meetings with soul. Chef restaurants, coffee shops and authentic Jerusalem atmosphere.
location.oldCityHook: 3,000 years of history — less than 10 minutes from the office.
location.greenLineTitle: The Green Line Light Rail — Opening This Year
location.greenLineDesc: A new line connecting Malha to the city center via GATE Jerusalem, with a station right at the tower. Direct access to every corner of the city.

developers.title: Developers & Partners
developers.bsr: BSR Group — Israel's leading commercial developer with dozens of landmark projects across Tel Aviv, Bnei Brak and Petach Tikva.
developers.jtlv: JTLV Fund — one of Israel's largest real estate investment funds. Holds 60% ownership of the GATE project.
developers.rahamim: Rahamim Company — a long-established development firm with a proven track record in the Israeli real estate market.
developers.blk: BLK Architects — a leading architecture firm specializing in tower and large-scale commercial projects of international caliber.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What does the floor price include?
faq.a1: The price includes the gross floor area (including common areas). Parking is priced separately — ₪250,000 + VAT per spot, 8 spots per floor.
faq.a2: Delivery is expected in 2029–2030, subject to construction progress.
faq.q3: Can I purchase part of a floor?
faq.a3: Absolutely. Each floor can be modularly divided into 8 office units (Models A–H). Individual units are available from 103 sqm net — complete flexibility.
faq.a4: 30% upon signing the purchase agreement, 70% at delivery. The project is fully financed by Bank Hapoalim with personal bank guarantees for every buyer — absolute security.
faq.a5: Secured underground parking with 8 dedicated spots per floor. Cost: ₪250,000 + VAT per parking spot.
faq.a6: Yes. The tower is designed to meet international LEED green building standards — one of Jerusalem's first certified green buildings. Energy efficiency, superior air quality and environmental responsibility that will enhance asset value for years to come.

quarter.title: Jerusalem Gateway {gold}Quarter{/gold}
quarter.subtitle: Israel's largest urban development — a world-class financial, business and cultural center
quarter.description: The Jerusalem Gateway Quarter is an unprecedented national initiative, championed by the Jerusalem Municipality and the Israeli Government. Located between Yitzhak Navon Station, the Knesset and the Supreme Court — it is set to transform the capital's entrance into a premier global business, commercial and cultural destination.
quarter.whyTitle: Why is the city driving this project?
quarter.whyDesc: Jerusalem is Israel's capital, yet until now it has lacked the modern financial center to match that status. The Quarter is designed to close that gap — attracting tech companies, international law and accounting firms and global corporations, while creating 60,000 new jobs and fundamentally reshaping Jerusalem's economy.
quarter.plannedDesc: A European-inspired commercial boulevard, international hotels, cultural institutions including the new Bezalel Academy of Arts & Design, government offices, courts, green parks and residential buildings — a complete urban ecosystem operating 24/7.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.intro: GATE Jerusalem is committed to digital accessibility and ensuring equal access to this website for all users, including people with disabilities.
accessibility.standardDesc: This website implements the requirements of Israeli Standard 5568 and WCAG 2.1 Level AA, in accordance with the Equal Rights for Persons with Disabilities Law (1998) and the Accessibility of Service Regulations (2013).
accessibility.feature4: Colour contrast meets WCAG AA requirements
accessibility.feature6: Proper semantic structure with hierarchical headings
accessibility.contactDesc: Encountered an accessibility issue? We're here to help. Contact us:
accessibility.response: We will respond to your inquiry within 5 business days.
accessibility.date: This statement was last updated: April 2026

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how GATE Jerusalem collects, uses and protects your personal information, in accordance with the Protection of Privacy Law (1981) and its regulations.
privacy.collectDesc: We collect information you voluntarily provide via the contact form: full name, phone number, email address and company name (optional). The website may also collect anonymous technical data for usage analytics.
privacy.useDesc: Your information will be used solely to follow up regarding the GATE Jerusalem project and to respond to your inquiries. We will not share your details with any third party without your explicit consent.
privacy.securityDesc: We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your information. Data is stored on secured, protected servers.
privacy.rightsDesc: Under applicable law, you have the right to access, correct or request deletion of your personal information. For such requests, please contact us directly.
privacy.cookiesDesc: This website may use cookies for analytics and to improve your browsing experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.contactDesc: For questions regarding this Privacy Policy, contact us: info@gate-jerusalem.co.il
privacy.date: This policy was last updated: April 2026
